input: When a user is removed from the "Contractors" Okta group, automatically deactivate their Okta account and send a notification to an internal webhook. The Lambda should run on a daily schedule as a sweep to catch any contractors whose end date has passed but are still active.
When a user is added to the Tableau Creator group in Okta, remove them from the Tableau Viewer and Tableau Explorer groups
build a rule or workflow that will add users to the creator role in tableau, but any time a user is added to that role they should be removed from their previous tableau role
